nasb.text: It was told the king of Jericho, saying, “Behold, men from the sons of Israel have come here tonight to search out the land.”

esv.text: And it was told to the king of Jericho, “Behold, men of Israel have come here tonight to search out the land.”

cnv.text: 有人向耶利哥王報告：“今夜從以色列人那裡有人進來，要窺探這地。”

ccb.text: 有人告诉耶利哥王说：“今天晚上有以色列人来这里刺探。”
